title: Taxon

taxonID.description: Unique identifier (UUID v5 from scientificName). Maps to dwc:taxonID.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier auto-generated from scientificName (lowercase, hyphenated).

scientificName.description: Full scientific name including authorship. Maps to dwc:scientificName.

vernacularNames.description: Common names by locale code (ISO 639-1). Example: {"en": "European Robin", "de": "Rotkehlchen"}. Maps to dwc:vernacularName.

kingdom.description: Kingdom name (e.g., Animalia). Maps to dwc:kingdom.

phylum.description: Phylum name (e.g., Chordata). Maps to dwc:phylum.

class.description: Class name (e.g., Aves). Maps to dwc:class.

order.description: Order name (e.g., Passeriformes). Maps to dwc:order.

family.description: Family name (e.g., Muscicapidae). Maps to dwc:family.

genus.description: Genus name (e.g., Erithacus). Maps to dwc:genus.

gbifKey.description: GBIF backbone taxonomy key for interoperability.

extensions.description: Tool-specific extensions. Keys must be namespaced: namespace.fieldName (e.g., myapp.customField).

description: Species taxonomy record. Maps to Darwin Core Taxon class (dwc:Taxon).

IUCNStatus.description: IUCN Red List categories: LC=Least Concern, NT=Near Threatened, VU=Vulnerable, EN=Endangered, CR=Critically Endangered, EW=Extinct in Wild, EX=Extinct, DD=Data Deficient, NE=Not Evaluated
